column3: Claims $28,000 of principal relates to disputed loads never delivered. Has BOL discrepancies as evidence.
Reviewed BOLs provided. Two loads show signed POD by debtor's own warehouse — delivery confirmed. Third load ($8,400) has no POD on file from creditor. Escalated to Swift Haul for documentation.
Provided POD for two loads. Third load POD still missing — driver retired and GPS records show delivery location matches debtor warehouse.
